title: ocotea rupestris
intro: Ocotea rupestris, also known as Sandalo de la Montaña, is a species of evergreen tree native to the mountainous regions of Central and South America, belonging to the family Lauraceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, attributed to its essential oil rich in limonene and other sesquiterpenes. The health benefits associated with Ocotea rupestris include relief from respiratory issues, skin irritations, and digestive problems, as well as its potential to reduce stress and promote relaxation. Ocotea rupestris is often used in herbal preparations such as essential oils, tinctures, and infusions, which can be applied topically or ingested under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
